query: We're about to bring Meilisearch into our disconnected RKE2 cluster for product search. Before I put it in front of the architecture board, can you check whether it actually works with zero internet egress and give me a verdict?

vet cursor for us — the pitch says BYOK but I suspect requests still route through their servers, which is a non-starter for our air-gapped devs
